CAREERS

Thornhill Child Care Society is continually seeking qualified Early Childhood Professionals who are dedicated to providing quality child care. We offer many opportunities for growth and professional development.

​

Benefits to joining our team include:

​

Top Wages

Benefit package including long-term disability

Sick Days

Paid Programming time

Health and Wellness Benefit

VISION STATEMENT

TCCS will be a leader in the field of child care and early learning through professional development, partnerships and advocacy. We will develop and deliver flexible service options that respond to family and community needs. We will continue our commitment to being an environment where our children and families can be nurtured.

Interested in Joining Our Team?

​

At Thornhill Child Care Society, we are always looking for passionate and dedicated Early Childhood Educators to join our team.

​

If you are interested in future opportunities, please send your resume and cover letter to info@thornhillchildcare.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

Thornhill Child Care Society

The Thornhill Child Care Society, established in 1974, is a non-profit run by a volunteer Board of Directors made up of community members. We offer child care and family support programs that foster children’s security, self-worth, independence, and growth.
